subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! That which thou hast penned hath been perused, and its contents noted. Whatsoever thou didst write [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید و بر مطالب اطلاع حاصل گشت هر چه مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant
